setup: Verify templates/ directory state. Check whether templates/ files are in manifest hashes.
rational_insight: Templates influence gate creation behavior. If trusted as operational policy, they should be locked or monitored. TCE must clarify whether templates are truly protected.
trigger_method: Run the next shell action or TCE comparison.
helios_evidence_refs: bypass-surface.md vector 9 â€” templates manipulation gap documented
restoration_steps: Verify envelope is CLEAN (template not in manifest, so envelope should remain clean)
expected_helios_behavior: If templates are in manifest: drift detected. If not in manifest (current state): NOT detected. tier_classifier.ps1 loads the template on next command.
controlled_mutation: Create or modify a template file under templates/ (e.g., operating-catalog.json).
